✓ serves it · ◐ with conditions · ✕ not served (proven) · ? not verified yet — hover any verdict for the receipt, click to pin it

Notes

WebSockets: Protocol-level WebSocket (framing, upgrader) — you assemble the client/server; it's not a drop-in socket like Starscream. Linux is home turf.

Badges for your README

Maintainer of SwiftNIO? These are yours — verified claims, linked to the receipts. Wrong verdict? That's a fix we want; see contribute.
